markdown:
# Working at K-Aqua

Creativity and experience are the basis for the development, manufacture and marketing of our market leading solutions in water supply.

We have reached a strong market position that we continue to strengthen and expand. If you would like to be a part of our ever-growing success and are interested in joining a modern and aggrandising company, then we look forward to receiving your application via email to andrea.nickel@k-aqua.de

For additional information regarding job openings and your career at K-Aqua, please contact us at +49 (0)60 85 / 9868-410.


[Contact us!](mailto:andrea.nickel@k-aqua.de)

html:
Working at K-Aqua

Creativity and experience are the basis for the development, manufacture and marketing of our market leading solutions in water supply.

We have reached a strong market position that we continue to strengthen and expand. If you would like to be a part of our ever-growing success and are interested in joining a modern and aggrandising company, then we look forward to receiving your application via email to andrea.nickel@k-aqua.de

For additional information regarding job openings and your career at K-Aqua, please contact us at +49 (0)60 85 / 9868-410.

Contact us!

json.company_description: Creativity and experience are the basis for the development, manufacture and marketing of our market leading solutions in water supply. We have reached a strong market position that we continue to strengthen and expand.

summary: K-Aqua emphasizes the importance of creativity and experience in developing, manufacturing, and marketing leading solutions in water supply. The company has a strong market position and is looking to expand its team. Interested candidates are encouraged to apply via email or contact for job openings.
